properties.Test Case: Run several tests to ensure that when re-uploading books to Bloom Library, only files that have changed are uploaded. Note: the PDF is always regenerated and there may be some small Bloom files that get uploaded (don't worry about these), but ensure that heavy-weight items like images, recordings, & videos which have not changed should are not uploaded.
properties.Steps: Run several tests to ensure that when re-uploading books to Bloom Library, only files that have changed are uploaded. Note: the PDF is always regenerated and there may be some small Bloom files that get uploaded (don't worry about these), but ensure that heavy-weight items like images, recordings, & videos which have not changed should are not uploaded.

properties.Test Case: test upload and re-upload of a book with > 1000 files. After 1st upload, make a small change -- add a page and a picture, then re-upload. [Resource in \Bloom Team\Testing\atomic upload test] The upload should succeed without a message "There was a problem uploading your book. " Ensure re-upload skips most files, especially all the .mp3 files.
properties.Steps: - test upload and re-upload of a book with > 1000 files. After 1st upload, make a small change -- add a page and a picture, then re-upload. [Resource in \Bloom Team\Testing\atomic upload test] The upload should succeed without a message "There was a problem uploading your book. "  Ensure re-upload skips most files, especially all the .mp3 files.

properties.Test Case: Make a new "moon and cap" book. Change to Device 16x9. Record the title by whole text box and insert a segment marker. Ensure playback retains spacing everywhere Bloom Player is used: BloomPUB preview; BloomPUB Viewer; Bloom Library READ; Bloom Reader.
properties.Steps: Make a new "moon and cap" book. Change to Device 16x9. Record the title by whole text box and insert a segment marker. Ensure playback retains spacing everywhere Bloom Player is used: BloomPUB preview; BloomPUB Viewer; Bloom Library READ; Bloom Reader.

properties.Test Case: Create a book with Enterprise-only features. Turn off Enterprise. Publishing refuses to open, with a warning message to users. With Enterprise turned off, you can publish a derivative book with overlays but cannot publish a book with any added overlays (Bloom will show a screen saying Enterprise Required and prompting you to active Enterprise or remove the Overlays). Other Enterprise pages may allow publishing, but Game pages (at least) are stripped from uploading and BloomPUB creation. Note that both ePUB and Audio/Video publishing require a Pro subscription regardless of content.
properties.Steps: Create a book with Enterprise-only features. Turn off Enterprise. Publishing refuses to open, with a warning message to users.  With Enterprise turned off, you can publish a derivative book with overlays but cannot publish a book with any added overlays (Bloom will show a screen saying Enterprise Required and prompting you to active Enterprise or remove the Overlays).  Other Enterprise pages may allow publishing, but Game pages (at least) are stripped from uploading and BloomPUB creation.  Note that both ePUB and Audio/Video publishing require a Pro subscription regardless of content.

properties.Test Case: With enterprise still off, remove the enterprise only pages from the book and publish again. Web and BloomPUB publishing should be allowed without the removal of any pages. ePUB and Audio/Video publishing require a Pro subscription regardless of content.
properties.Steps: - With enterprise still off, remove the enterprise only pages from the book and publish again. Web and BloomPUB publishing should be allowed without the removal of any pages.  ePUB and Audio/Video publishing require a Pro subscription regardless of content.
